The Stomping Ground

A place or area that someone is very familiar with and where they like to spend time.

An Achievable Open World - A Short Hike

Wed Jul 31 2024 17:00:00 GMT-0700 (Pacific Daylight Time)

For the last decade, I've mostly been a competitive video game player. I'm beyond my prime, and it's mostly the way I keep up with my friends. However, I decided recently that I wanted to explore some single player games as a way for me to decompress for fifteen or thirty minutes during the day.

A Short Hike
